prompt: A highly realistic studio portrait of a woman in her mid-20s with a naturally fit build, framed from mid-torso up at eye level, standing in a relaxed yet confident pose with squared shoulders and a calm, neutral, self-assured expression. She has thick, long, dark brown to nearly black curly hair with natural volume, loose defined curls, and a slightly off-center part, falling over both shoulders. She wears 2 visible clothing pieces: an olive green fitted crew-neck t-shirt and a light beige casual jacket worn open and slipping off both shoulders for an effortless editorial look. Use a muted neutral palette with earthy tones. Shoot with an 85mm portrait lens at f/2.8, tack-sharp focus on the subject, shallow depth of field, and soft natural background blur. Light the scene with a professional studio setup: a soft front key light, subtle fill to preserve gentle shadow detail, and a faint rim light for separation. Place her against a clean smooth studio backdrop in a soft warm beige-gray neutral gradient with no distractions. Keep skin tones accurate and realistic, color grading natural and balanced, post-processing minimal, and overall styling like a modern editorial fashion portrait in casual streetwear, ultra-detailed, clean, and photorealistic.
